zh.lifeSummary: 當George Thomas Hughson於1717年4月23日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼奧拉費利普斯包格時，他的父親Thomas B HUGHSON20歲，母親Christina Catherina Neythaber27歲。他於1738年與Susannah Shewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼奧拉費利普斯包格結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1769年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南享年52歲，埋葬在美國紐約州普特南卡梅爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Thomas Hughson于1717年4月23日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼奧拉費利普斯包格时，他的父亲Thomas B HUGHSON20岁，母亲Christina Catherina Neythaber27岁。他于1738年与Susannah Shewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼奧拉費利普斯包格结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1769年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南享年52岁，埋葬在美国纽约州普特南卡梅爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hughson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Huson
meanings: English: patronymic from the personal name Hugh, Hue (see Hugh ) + -son.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When George Thomas Hughson was born on 23 April 1717, in Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas B HUGHSON, was 20 and his mother, Christina Catherina Neythaber, was 27. He married Susannah Shewis in 1738, in Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 April 1769, in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in Carmel, Putnam, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Thomas Hughson est né le 23 avril 1717, à Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas B HUGHSON, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Christina Catherina Neythaber, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Susannah Shewis en 1738, à Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1769, à Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Carmel, Putnam, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Thomas Hughson am 23. April 1717 in Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas B HUGHSON 20 und seine Mutter Christina Catherina Neythaber 27. Er hat 1738 in Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America Susannah Shewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1769 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Carmel, Putnam, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Thomas Hughson è nato il il 23 aprile 1717 nel Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas B HUGHSON, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Christina Catherina Neythaber, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Susannah Shewis nel 1738, nel Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1769, nel Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Carmel, Putnam, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: George Thomas Hughsonが1717年4月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーオランッジフィリプスブルグで生まれた時，父Thomas B HUGHSONは20歳，母Christina Catherina Neythaberは27歳であった。1738年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーオランッジフィリプスブルグでSusannah Shewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1769年4月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーチャーロットプウトナムで52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州プウトナムカーメルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Thomas Hughson(이)가 1717년 4월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 오랑 필립스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas B HUGHSON(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Catherina Neythaber(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1738년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 오랑 필립스버그에서 Susannah Shewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1769년 4월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 찰로트 풋남에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 풋남 카멀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Thomas Hughson nasceu em 23 de abril de 1717, em Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas B HUGHSON, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Christina Catherina Neythaber, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Susannah Shewis em 1738, em Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1769, em Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Carmel, Putnam, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Thomas Hughson родился 23 апреля 1717 г. в местности филлипсбург, оранг, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas B HUGHSON было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Catherina Neythaber, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Shewis в 1738 г. в местности филлипсбург, оранг, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 апреля 1769 г. в местности путнам, чарлотт, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности кармел, путнам, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Thomas Hughson nació el 23 de abril de 1717, en Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas B HUGHSON, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Christina Catherina Neythaber, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Susannah Shewis en 1738, en Phillipsburg, Orange, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1769, en Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Carmel, Putnam, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
